text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out, I accompany Agnes Digital to a
shopping mall.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Remember how I talked about the release event
tied to the photo books I bought before? Turns
out I won! So, we need to prepare.
choice_data_list: What do we need to buy?
What do we need to buy?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Deodorant.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...Um, don't you get sweaty at these kinds of
things?! I know I can't help it, but I get all hot and
flustered every time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And I don't want the people around me getting a
whiff of that! Or, heavens forbid, have one of my
oshis smell it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Then, people will start spreading rumors that Uma
simps are stinky!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't be able to live with myself!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
On another point, recently in all these races, I've
had lots of opportunities to be near other
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So I need to be very careful about what
deodorant I choose. I'm using unscented right
now, but I've been thinking it'd be nice to find
something that kills all smells...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Like something that would get rid of the scent of
my shampoo and conditioner as well. I wanna be
totally odorless so I can better sense the
fragrance of my Umas.
Totally odorless, huh? Hm. Interesting.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hyagh! Tachyon?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heheh, here I am walking around, minding my
own business, when the most intriguing idea grace
my ears—a deodorant that makes you completely
odorless... Shall I try my hand at it?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In a previous study, I had managed to create a
liquid with very strong deodorizing properties.
Improving said solution might produce something
akin to what you're in search of.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whoaaa... Look at your eyes gleaming with excitement...
So wuvely...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Not at all! Have at it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh... That's a good answer. Well, if
you'll excuse me for now...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniff... Hmmm, I see...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hyaaargyahg!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, next I'd like to observe your physical
reactions and the quantity of sweat produced
while under the conditions in which you would use
deodorant.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Huh. It doesn't appear Digital is capable of responding at the moment. Well then, Trainer, what situation do you think would be most appropriate?
choice_data_list: Maybe a place she wants to go to?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Before and after a race, you say? In other words,
a situation that produces both feelings of passion
and anxiety.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I know of an environment that can
replicate a similar state and assist us in obtaining
data a great deal faster than running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Agnes Tachyon leads us to... an
amusement park roller coaster.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm sitting next to Tachyon?! O-oh, be still, my
beating heart!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sh-she's so close... Pant, pant... Oh... m-m-my heart! Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Your breathing is quite irregular... So tell me,
have you begun sweating?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Too... close! Your hair is nearly brushing my
cheek! Nononono! Touching Umamusume is off
limits! But there's nowhere to ruuuuunnngyahhh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear it, Trainer? When the coaster
dropped, Tachyon let out a little gasp!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Her intellectual demeanor slipped for just a split
second! Do you know how rare of a moment that
was?! My heart won't stop pounding!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Wonderful job, Digital! That
heightened state of yours didn't waver for a
second—before, during, or after the ride!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's fascinating how far beyond the norm you are!
Do you have a limitless supply of endorphins?!
AHAHAHAHA!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Squeal! Oh, Tachyon... You sound like you're having so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Indeed... I'm itching to get back and analyze your
reactions! So, if you don't mind, I'll be off!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm... so... happy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I catch Agnes Digital as she falls under a fainting
spell. It seems the two of them had a really good
time. What more could I ask for?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Agnes Digital comes to me with
a deodorant cream in hand, happily reporting the
exceptional quality of Agnes Tachyon's work.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A place she wants to go to, hmm? Then let us
wake her up if you think such a location will
replicate the state of excitement that sometimes
overcomes her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmph... I wasn't expecting this from you, Digital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I chose it because the cakes are really good. You
don't like places like this?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't say that. If it is demanded of me, I'll
say it all depends on what's on the menu.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as the cake and tea we order arrives,
Agnes Tachyon digs in.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Oh my! My entire brain is inundated in
sweetness!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Mmmm, very nice. An eccentric degree of sugar
content... Very much to my liking.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The cake's bizarre color dampens one's appetite,
suppressing the amount of dopamine released.
Perhaps it's to prevent the overconsumption of
sugar?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Tachyon... you're so precious how you're enjoying the cake...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Whoops, I shouldn't get carried away. Digital,
let's check your condition.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Face flushed, breathing irregular... Despite the
relaxed environment you seem to be in quite the
state of excitement. Heh-heh.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Very good. I think have enough data to begin
crafting your custom deodorant. Yes... first off,
I'll need some antibacterial—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! Look at Tachyon lost in thought!
Record! I must preserve her expression on video!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital looks overjoyed as she watches the
engrossed Agnes Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Agnes Digital comes to me with
a deodorant cream in hand, happily reporting the
exceptional quality of Agnes Tachyon's work.
